series_metadata.series_description: Report queries pulled for various work functions from COGNOS, OSCAR/AWARE, BEAMS, CATS, OAKS, OHMS, IBM, TRAC, SOPPS and any additional database accessed by the agency. These report/queries are transient in nature as they can be reproduced upon demand.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value and then destroy. No RC-3 is necessary when destroying these records. ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value and then destroy. No RC-3 is necessary when destroying these records., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
